specific_question: How many company-branded mobile devices were distributed to employees by MediConn Solutions in 2024?
answer: Around 50 company-branded mobile devices were distributed to employees by MediConn Solutions in 2024.
justification: The device distribution is an IT asset management activity and not linked to CPPA privacy or consent compliance.
dr_question: As the CPPA Act (Bill C-27) awaits parliamentary decision, how can MediConn build preparedness measures to ensure a smooth transition in the event the Act comes into effect by Q2 2026?
